channel.title: Recon 6 — R6 Siege Strategy Updates
channel.description: Latest map guides, operator analysis, and ranked strategy from Recon 6.

item.title: Bank Strategy Guide — Ranked Loadouts, Callouts, Bans
item.description: Complete strategy guide for Bank — operator picks, callouts, utility usage, and ban recommendations for every bombsite. Updated for current ranked meta.
